sourceMovie.title: The Meg
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: The Meg works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and science fiction blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Meg 2: The Trench
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Meg clicked for you, Meg 2: The Trench (2023) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Meg?
faq.answer: Try Meg 2: The Trench, Underwater, Megaboa—each shares DNA with The Meg while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Meg?
faq.answer: The Meg (2018) is best described as Action, Science Fiction, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Meg part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "The Meg Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
